name: render
description: Generates human-readable output from spec: collated markdown, graphviz DOT, machine-readable JSON.

requirements.title: Render markdown
requirements.description: Generate a collated spec document in markdown. Structure: requirements → architecture → implementation, with content inlined from markdown files.

requirements.title: Render DOT
requirements.description: Generate a graphviz DOT graph of spec nodes and edges. Nodes are requirements, components, impl_sections. Edges are implements, uses, describes, depends_on.

requirements.title: Render JSON
requirements.description: Generate a machine-readable JSON graph of the full spec. All nodes and edges in a single JSON document for piping to other tools.

requirements.title: Composable output
requirements.description: All render output goes to stdout. Format is selected via subcommand or flag. Output is pipeable to other tools.

components.name: SpecReader
components.description: Reads and parses the spec directory into an in-memory graph structure for rendering.

components.name: MarkdownRenderer
components.description: Generates a collated markdown document from the parsed spec, inlining content from markdown files.

components.name: DOTRenderer
components.description: Generates a graphviz DOT graph from the parsed spec.

components.name: JSONRenderer
components.description: Generates a full JSON graph from the parsed spec.

data_flows.name: Render pipeline
data_flows.description: Spec JSON + markdown leaves → parsed graph → format-specific output (markdown, DOT, or JSON) → stdout.
